sources.relevance: Defines user-interaction event latency observations and interaction grouping; the draft explicitly remains work in progress.
Defines long-animation-frame observations used as an independent rendering-blocking evidence stream.

finding: The repeated-trial evidence packet is not operationally protected unless CI invokes both the exact Event Timing/Long Animation Frames evaluator integration test and the packet integrity test in one fail-closed command. The gate must preserve child-process failure and must not upgrade deterministic contract success into deployment or physical-device proof.
design_implication: Use one explicit runner with an immutable default pair of test paths, machine-readable output, non-zero status propagation, a claim limit, and a falsification route. Keep target-browser and deployment verification as separate evidence layers.

verification.route: isolated Node test runner over byte-identical gate logic and tests

evidence_strength: source-verified plus isolated deterministic contract test
uncertainty: The specifications are editor drafts and browser implementation behavior can change. The gate has not yet been executed in repository CI against both underlying test suites.
falsification_route: Reject this implementation if the runner omits or substitutes either exact test file, masks a child failure, returns success after an execution error, or is used as evidence of deployment or target-device behavior without independent proof.
